w. w. Cotton, of the Oregon
Railroad G. Navigation Co., an
swered for the railroads. He said
that 16 or IS years ago Spokane
was a small town and although his
line was built to within so miles Of
/ here there was not enough business
to Justify extending 1t. He said that
notwithstanding water competition
Spokane now has a preferential
rate In the Palouse country. In
1905 it distributed 1854 tons there
against Portland's 1886 tons. Spo-
kane, by the prevailing system Of
tariffs, was enabled to ship 113
miles west and absolutely control
that territory known as the Inland
empire.


He argued that the real object Of
the fight was to reach down and
sell goods in the Walla Walla
valley, which Is controlled by Port
land. He pointed out the fact that
in 1892 Spokane's population was
10000, while now it claims 10000.
Cotton claimed Spokane had a rate
to Colfax cheaper than the rate
from Colfax here. He said the ulti-
mate decision of the commission
would either bound Spokane's terri
tory or add to 1t.


Seth Mann, of San Francisco.
representing the jobbers' associa-
ton down there, said that If the re-
suit of the findings of the commits
sion favored Spokane he would ask
| for 80 days in which the coast
cities might prepare evidence and
he would ask that the commission


hold sessions In those towns. II
anything, he said, there were dis
examinations in favor of Spokane.
| There has been very material in


crease in ocean competition and he
belied Spokane's fight was an at
tack on this competition.


Representing the city and county
are H. NJ. Stephens, James Ger
agility and Brooks Adams, Of Bos-
ton; Northern Pacific and Great


Northern railroads, l.. C.. Gilman,


Charles Donnelly and E. ]. Cam
non; o. r. & NJ, w. w. Cotton;
| coast jobbers of Seattle, Portland,
Tacoma and San Francisco are rep


resented by Seth Mann and Fred


Ulsman. H. D. Loveland, president


of the Pacific Coast Jobbers' asso-


citation. and numerous railroad


officials, are interested listeners.


Prosecuting Attorney Barnhart's


application for the right of Spokane


county to intervene was presented
by Attorney Stephens and allowed
| by the commission. San Francisco
jobbers, the Portland chamber OF


commerce and Tacoma jobbers


were also allowed to intervene.
